contracts.contractsManagement: Contract management for your job offers
contracts.contractActiveDescription: Your contract is active. You can download both signed copies.
contracts.contractActiveDescriptionEmployer: Active contract. You can download both signed copies.
contracts.uploadDigitalContract: Upload the contract in digital format
contracts.clickOrDrag: Click or drag your file here
contracts.onlyPDFs: PDFs only. The document will be saved in a private bucket.
contracts.selectFileError: Select a PDF file to continue
contracts.legalDisclaimer: The data entered in this contract must be based on the current Labor Code. Its content and acceptance are the sole responsibility of the worker and the employer. The application acts only as an intermediary and is not responsible for the information provided or the use of the contract.
contracts.storageNotice: The contract will be stored in a private bucket and access will be managed with signed URLs.
contracts.saveInfo: Upon saving, the contract will be created, the PDF uploaded, and the status will change to sent.
contracts.copyReady: Your copy is ready! Click Accept to finish.
contracts.contractComplete: The contract will be Completed when both parties upload their signed copy.
contracts.copySentNotice: Your copy was sent. The employer will review it and activate the contract.
contracts.eachPartyAccess: Each party only has access to their own signed copy.
contracts.rejectContractConfirm: Are you sure you want to reject this contract?
contracts.contractRejectedDescription: This contract was rejected and no longer requires action.
contracts.sendInfoUploaded: Your copy was sent. The employer will review it and activate the contract.
contracts.sendInfo: Upon sending, the employer will review your copy and activate the contract.
contracts.uploadFileError: You must upload your copy of the contract before accepting
contracts.copySentSuccess: Signed copy sent! The employer will review and activate the contract.
contracts.documentReadyReview: Document uploaded and ready to review
contracts.workerNotUploaded: The worker has not yet uploaded their signed copy
contracts.reviewAndActivate: Review the signed copy and activate the contract to finalize.
contracts.waitingForUpload: Waiting for the worker to upload their signed copy.
contracts.reviewNotice: Only activate the contract when you have reviewed the worker's signed copy.
contracts.activateInfo: Upon activation, the contract will change to accepted status.
contracts.missingDataError: Missing data to load the contract
contracts.applicationNotFoundError: The selected application was not found
contracts.applicationMismatchError: The application does not match this offer
contracts.applicationNotAcceptedError: The application must be accepted to attach the contract
contracts.finalizeContractConfirm: Are you sure you want to finalize this contract?
contracts.contractFinalizedDescription: This contract was finalized. You can review the termination details.
contracts.terminationPendingDescription: Contract termination has been requested. The other party must respond to complete the process.
contracts.terminationPrompt: If you need to finalize the contract, fill in the details and confirm.
contracts.terminationReasonPlaceholder: Describe the reason for the termination
contracts.terminationUnavailable: Termination is only available when the contract is active.
